name: Purdue University

englishRequirement.note: English composition or speech is required as a pre-transfer course. International students must also meet TOEFL 80+, IELTS 6.5+, or Duolingo 105+.

requiredCourses.name: Calculus I
requiredCourses.description: Equivalent to MA 16100 or MA 16500 at Purdue.

requiredCourses.name: Calculus II
requiredCourses.description: Equivalent to MA 16200 or MA 16600 at Purdue.

requiredCourses.name: Advanced Math, Chemistry, or Physics
requiredCourses.description: One advanced course in math, chemistry, or physics.

requiredCourses.name: English Composition or Speech
requiredCourses.description: A college-level English composition or speech course. Must be completed (not in progress) at time of application.

notes: All required courses must be completed and cannot be in progress at time of application. Minimum 3.0 GPA. Source: admissions.purdue.edu
